scripts.dev: concurrently -n emulators,client,server -c cyan,green,yellow "npm run emulators" "npm run dev --workspace=client" "npm run dev --workspace=server"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=client && npm run build --workspace=server
scripts.deploy:client: npm run build --workspace=client && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.dev:clean: npm run kill-ports && npm run dev
